BiocAnnotationLab 0.0.1
  • Get started
  • Reference

BiocAnnotationLab: A developmental coding and data laboratory for strategies used in Bioconductor to curate genomic annotation for genomic data science

Motivation

Bioconductor’s annotation resources are extensive and can be challenging to maintain for various reasons. This package collects information relevant to

  • reducing complexity of annotation management
  • taking advantage of new approaches to data representation
  • supporting “self-service” solutions for those needing rapid revision of annotation resources

See the vignette (Get started tab above) for more details. There is a “next steps” component. Visitors are invited to comment in repository issues.
